_comment: Positives describe packaging a skill as a zip; negatives lean on sibling capabilities or are out of scope.
positive: Bundle a skill as a zip archive
Zip the skill directory for distribution
Exclude assets and scripts from the bundle
Preserve the internal layout in the archive
Package the skill into a zip bundle
Build a distribution archive of the skill
negative: Validate the skill against the specification
Convert a flat skill into the router pattern
Decide between standalone and router architecture
